REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT MONTY BRACHA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADD, HAMO, A NECESSARY PARTY TO THIS ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION IS DEVOID OF ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT HARO IS NOT A NECESSARY PARTY TO THIS ACTION. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS DENIED. ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MONTY BRACHA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to add, Hamo, a necessary party to this action. Plaintiff's opposition is devoid of any authority for the proposition that Haro is not a necessary party to this action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Motion to Strike request for punitive damages is denied. Allegations are sufficient. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Continued To Apr-27-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MONTY BRACHA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to April 27, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than march 30, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.
Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
